summary: Tested grounds dedup fix and frontend pages. CRITICAL BUG FOUND: Grounds still multiplying despite fuzzy dedup code being in place. The LEGAL_TOPICS dictionary in ground_dedup.py is missing keywords to catch 'Media Influence on Jury' as duplicate of 'Prejudicial Media Coverage'. Frontend pages (/how-to-use, /how-it-works) load correctly with proper text sizes and content.

critical.issue: Grounds STILL multiplying - 'Media Influence on Jury' created as duplicate of 'Prejudicial Media Coverage'. Fuzzy dedup code exists but LEGAL_TOPICS keywords are incomplete.
critical.root_cause: ground_dedup.py LEGAL_TOPICS['media_coverage'] has keywords like 'media coverage', 'prejudicial media' but NOT 'media influence' or just 'media'. Title 'Media Influence on Jury' doesn't match any keyword.
critical.fix_required: Add more keywords to LEGAL_TOPICS['media_coverage']: 'media influence', 'media bias', 'media' (standalone), 'jury media'

action_items: CRITICAL: Update ground_dedup.py LEGAL_TOPICS['media_coverage'] to add more keywords: 'media influence', 'media bias', 'media' (as standalone word check), 'jury media', 'media on jury'
Consider lowering fuzzywuzzy threshold from 65 to 55 for media-related titles
Consider adding a new topic 'jury_media_influence' with keywords specific to jury/media combinations
critical_code_review_comments: ground_dedup.py is_ground_duplicate() has correct logic but LEGAL_TOPICS dictionary is incomplete
fuzzywuzzy score of 45 for 'Media Influence on Jury' vs 'Prejudicial Media Coverage' is below 65 threshold
Word overlap ratio of 33% is below 45% threshold
The fix applied to grounds.py (_classify_pipeline_issues and _sync_pipeline_issues_to_grounds) is correct - they DO use is_ground_duplicate()
The bug is in the LEGAL_TOPICS dictionary not having enough keywords to catch semantic duplicates

success_rate.backend: 82% (9/11 tests passed, 1 failed due to dedup bug, 1 error due to transient 502)

seed_data_creation: Deleted duplicate ground 'Media Influence on Jury' (gnd_447332d7db52) created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: The grounds dedup fix in grounds.py is correctly implemented (uses is_ground_duplicate from ground_dedup.py). However, the LEGAL_TOPICS dictionary needs more keywords to catch semantic duplicates like 'Media Influence on Jury' vs 'Prejudicial Media Coverage'. The fuzzywuzzy score between these is only 45 (threshold 65) and word overlap is 33% (threshold 45%). Frontend pages /how-to-use and /how-it-works both load correctly with proper mobile text sizes.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Grounds multiplying from 6 to 7 on second auto-identify call
reproduction_steps: 5. Grounds count increased to 7 - 'Media Influence on Jury' created as duplicate
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: LEGAL_TOPICS['media_coverage'] in ground_dedup.py has keywords: 'media coverage', 'prejudicial media', 'media bias', 'juror bias from media', 'pretrial publicity'. The title 'Media Influence on Jury' doesn't contain any of these exact phrases. fuzzywuzzy score is 45 (below 65 threshold), word overlap is 33% (below 45% threshold).
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Add more keywords to LEGAL_TOPICS['media_coverage']: 'media influence', 'media on jury', 'jury media'. Or add a new topic 'jury_media' with keywords: 'media influence', 'media on jury', 'jury media', 'media jury'.
